input:
AGENT INTERNAL NOTE
Property: townhouse, Guadalmina Baja, San Pedro de Alcántara, 4 bed, garden.
Property is an estate sale following the death of the owner, Eduardo M.
His three adult children are the heirs. Two want to sell quickly;
the third is contesting the will in a Madrid court.
The legal dispute may delay the title transfer by 6–18 months
unless the contesting heir agrees a settlement.
We have been approached by two of the heirs directly; they are
not speaking to the third. Price is €680,000.
There is a basement room that was converted without building licence —
the previous owner's addition. It is not included in the registered
surface area on the nota simple.
Categories: C2 (will contest/estate litigation), C4 (unlicensed basement), C5 (death, family dispute), C6 (heir conflict, third party details)
output:
TAGS: [Priced for quick sale] [Private garden] [Guadalmina Baja location] [Renovation budget advised] [Verify registered surface area]

DESCRIPTION: This four-bedroom townhouse in Guadalmina Baja features a private garden and a spacious layout. It offers an ideal retreat for families seeking a serene lifestyle in a highly sought-after area of San Pedro de Alcántara. This property is currently available for immediate viewing and represents a timely opportunity for those ready to move quickly.
